high_critical.title: Next.js Denial of Service via crafted App Router request (CVE-2026-23869)

vercel dev dependency cascade — path-to-regexp (ReDoS), tar (arbitrary file read/write via hardlink), undici (insufficient randomness), minimatch (ReDoS), @vercel/build-utils (@vercel/python-analysis chain), @vercel/node (multiple)
Arbitrary File Read/Write via hardlink attack

repos.note: 22 high vulns are dominated by the vercel CLI dev dependency and its transitive chain. Run npm audit fix --force to update; expect breaking changes to vercel CLI version. Prioritize path-to-regexp and tar as highest actual risk.

high_critical.title: Next.js Denial of Service via crafted App Router request (CVE-2026-23869)
Next.js Denial of Service via crafted App Router request (CVE-2026-23869)

prioritized_fixes.label: URGENT — Next.js security vulns (DoS + HTTP smuggling)
prioritized_fixes.action: cd <repo> && npm audit fix (or bump next to ^16.2.4 in package.json)
prioritized_fixes.details: CVE-2026-23869: App Router Server Function DoS. HTTP request smuggling separate advisory. Fix: next@16.2.4. Note: Next.js 16 has breaking changes from 15.x — audit async Request API usage before force-upgrading.
prioritized_fixes.auto_fixable: Partial — npm audit fix handles patch; major bump to 16.x may require manual migration (async cookies/headers/params)

prioritized_fixes.label: Vite Path Traversal — career-launchpad
prioritized_fixes.details: Vite path traversal allows reading arbitrary files outside the project root via specially crafted URLs. Dev-only risk but worth patching.

prioritized_fixes.label: tar Arbitrary File Read/Write — texas-elections
prioritized_fixes.details: tar package allows arbitrary file read/write via hardlink attack. Part of vercel CLI dependency cascade.

prioritized_fixes.label: flatted Prototype Pollution — career-launchpad
prioritized_fixes.details: flatted parse() vulnerable to prototype pollution. Risk depends on whether untrusted input passes through flatted.

prioritized_fixes.label: path-to-regexp + picomatch Method Injection/ReDoS — texas-elections, cca-study, career-launchpad
prioritized_fixes.action: npm audit fix --force in each affected repo
prioritized_fixes.details: path-to-regexp and picomatch both have method injection / ReDoS issues. Low exploitability in typical usage but should be patched.

prioritized_fixes.label: vercel CLI cascade (22 high vulns) — texas-elections
prioritized_fixes.action: cd texas-elections && npm audit fix --force — or consider whether vercel CLI is needed as a project dep vs global install
prioritized_fixes.details: The vercel package installed as a project dependency brings in a large transitive dep tree with multiple known vulns. Consider moving to a global vercel CLI install and removing from project package.json.
prioritized_fixes.auto_fixable: Partial — --force required; breaking vercel CLI version bump

summary.most_urgent: Next.js CVE-2026-23869 (DoS) + HTTP smuggling — affects 5 of 6 repos, fix available at next@16.2.4
summary.second_priority: texas-elections vercel CLI cascade (22 high) — path-to-regexp, tar, undici, minimatch
summary.note: No critical severity vulns found. All high-severity vulns have fixes available. The 28 high count is inflated by texas-elections' vercel CLI cascade (22 of 28). True unique exploitable vulns are ~6-8.
